lines.en_lit: to who says bull of Yom Kippur an offering an individual, perform substitution or not perform substitution not by inference that there is one who says that communal?
No, by inference that there is one who says that of partners.
the matter itself. Rabbi Elazar asked: to who says bull of Yom Kippur an individual offering, perform substitution or not perform substitution? What is the dilemma he is raising?
Do we follow who consecrates Or do we follow who seeks atonement
obvious that we follow who seeks atonement, as Rabbi Abbahu said Rabbi Yoḥanan said: one who consecrates he adds a fifth And the one for whom atones perform substitution for it,
And one who separates from his for of another, benefit of discretion is his,
Actually, obvious to that we follow who seeks atonement and this is his dilemma: his fellow priests achieve atonement by the essence Or perhaps they achieve atonement incidentally,

Come hear a stricture to the sacrifice, beyond to the substitute; and a stricture to the substitution, beyond to the sacrifice. a stricture to the sacrifice, as the sacrifice applies to an individual as to a community, and overrides Shabbat and ritual impurity, perform substitution which is not to the substitute,

a stricture to the substitute beyond to the sacrifice, that substitution takes effect on a permanently blemished animal. And cannot vacate non-sacred to be sheared and to be worked, which is not to the sacrifice,

What are the circumstances this sacrifice? If we say of an individual, does override Shabbat and ritual impurity? Rather, of a community, can perform substitution Rather, is it not with bull, overrides Shabbat and ritual impurity, as that a fixed time? And perform substitution as it is an offering an individual.
Rav Sheshet said: No, to ram of Aaron

So, too, it is reasonable for if it should enter your mind with the bull of it Shabbat and ritual impurity substitution of the bull does not override, one sacrifice on a weekday? It is a substitute for a sin-offering, and the substitute for a sin-offering is left to die.
No, actually bull of and what is the substitution category substitution,
If so, also sacrifice category sacrifices, not teaching category sacrifices,

From where From that it is taught: a stricture to the that substitution takes effect on a permanently blemished animal, and cannot vacate non-sacred to be sheared and to be worked. And should it enter your mind What is sacrifice category sacrifices; there is
